message:
fix(tests): ensure beads integration tests always clean up test beads

beads-integration.test.ts created test beads in close/CRUD tests without
tracking them in createdBeadIds. If a test failed before the close step,
those beads remained as orphans in the tracker. Now all four untracked
creation sites push to createdBeadIds so afterAll cleanup catches them.

Also includes:
- Checkpoint service/test updates
- Cost-analytics parseInt dedup (bd-1ng4)
- DB connection test-env migration
- Supervisor service update
- Beads tracker sync (bd-1d5k, bd-3n8u, bd-1eq8 closed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
